caption: The video captures a live event celebrating the Bharatiya Janata Party's (BJP) Foundation Day, as indicated by the text "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" prominently displayed at the top. The scene is split into two frames: on the left, a speaker, identified as the Prime Minister, is addressing the audience with a passionate gesture, emphasizing a point. He is dressed in traditional attire, wearing an orange turban and a white kurta with an orange and green shawl. The background behind him features repeated BJP logos. On the right, a large audience, also dressed in similar traditional attire with orange turbans and shawls, listens attentively. The setting appears to be a formal gathering, likely in Delhi, as suggested by the text in the top right corner. The overall atmosphere conveys a sense of unity and celebration among the party members.
